# Elmo Contributor License Agreement — Signature Registry
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#
# Each line below is the GitHub username of a contributor who has signed
# the Elmo Contributor License Agreement (CLA).
#
# By opening a pull request that adds your GitHub username to this file,
# you agree to be bound by the terms of the CLA in respect of all
# Contributions you have made and will make to projects of Blue Whale
# Software, LLC.
#
# Read the CLA before signing:
#   https://github.com/elmohq/elmo/blob/main/CLA.md
#
# Format:
#   - one GitHub username per line, lowercase, no leading "@"
#   - lines beginning with "#" are comments and are ignored
#   - blank lines are ignored
#
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
